_readme: Railway template variable reference. Sections below match each service in the template editor.

SECRET_KEY_BASE.description: Rails encryption key. Auto-generated — never change after first deploy.

ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: AES-256 key for encrypting Planning Center OAuth tokens. Auto-generated.

RAILS_LOG_LEVEL.description: Log verbosity. Options: debug, info, warn, error.

RESEND_API_KEY.description: REQUIRED. API key from resend.com. Used for magic link login emails.

MAILER_FROM.description: REQUIRED. Sender address — must be from a verified Resend domain. Example: Kidspire <noreply@mail.yourdomain.com>

FRONTEND_BASE_URL.description: REQUIRED. Public URL of the app. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app

VITE_API_BASE_URL.description: REQUIRED. Public API URL. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app/api/v1

CORS_ORIGINS.description: REQUIRED. Must match FRONTEND_BASE_URL. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app

PCO_CLIENT_SECRET.description: REQUIRED. OAuth client secret from Planning Center.

PCO_REDIRECT_URI.description: REQUIRED. Must match exactly what is registered in Planning Center. Example: https://yourapp.up.railway.app/auth/pco/callback

PCO_KIDS_MINISTRY_TAG.description: Tag name in PCO People used to identify kids ministry families.

CUSTOM_DOMAIN.description: OPTIONAL. Custom domain. Leave blank to use the Railway-provided URL.

TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID.description: OPTIONAL. Only required for SMS invite links. Starts with AC...

TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN.description: OPTIONAL. Only required for SMS invite links.

TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER.description: OPTIONAL. Twilio phone number in E.164 format. Example: +15551234567
